name: web-design
description: Web design & build specialist team — web architect (IA, stack, hosting), UX designer (wireframes, flows, conversion), visual designer (brand, typography, tokens), frontend implementer (HTML/CSS/JS, React, Astro, Next), content strategist (copy, microcopy, SEO content), accessibility auditor (WCAG 2.2 AA/AAA), performance engineer (Core Web Vitals, image/font optimization), SEO technical analyst (schema, sitemaps, OG). 4 skills (design-system audit, accessibility review, Core Web Vitals tuning, technical SEO audit), 8 templates, 1 advisory hook (oversized rasters, missing alt, hardcoded colors instead of tokens, missing meta tags). Inherits ravenclaude-core protocols.
